name: Bacardi Double-Chocolate Rum Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Combine cake mix, pudding, eggs, and half of the rum in a large mixing bowl. Stir in water and oil.
3. Using an electric mixer, beat at low speed until moistened. Beat at medium speed for 2 minutes.
4. Add chocolate pieces and pour batter into a greased 12-cup Bundt pan.
5. Bake for 50-60 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool in the pan for 15 minutes, then remove to a wire rack.
6. Heat raspberry preserves and remaining rum. Strain through a sieve to remove seeds.
7. Place cake on a serving platter. Prick surface with a fork.
8. Brush raspberry glaze over the cake, allowing it to absorb before repeating until all glaze is absorbed.
9. Melt chocolate pieces and shortening in a microwave. Stir until smooth.
10. Spoon chocolate icing over the cooled cake and let stand for 10 minutes.
11. Combine vanilla baking bar and water in a microwave-safe dish. Microwave on high for 30 seconds, then drizzle over the icing.
